title: RoundtablePluginConfig
description: Configuration schema for the Roundtable OpenCode plugin.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE validation.

defaultTimeoutMs.description: Per-agent timeout in milliseconds. Use -1 for no timeout.

loopSimilarityThreshold.description: Jaccard bigram similarity threshold for loop detection (0.0 - 1.0)

toolOutputPreviewMax.description: Maximum characters of tool output to include in preview

defaultObserverPrompt.description: Overrides the built-in observer prompt template
